title: OSINT Industries
description:
OSINT Industries is a digital-footprint and account-discovery service. Given a selector (email address, phone number, username, or cryptocurrency wallet), it queries 300+ modules and returns the online accounts, profiles and breach exposures associated with that selector, along with profile details such as creation dates, locations, linked emails/URLs and profile pictures.

Integrating OSINT Industries with OpenCTI lets analysts enrich an observable (Email-Addr, Phone-Number, User-Account or Cryptocurrency-Wallet) into a star-shaped map of the discovered accounts, all linked back to the queried observable. The connector also attaches human-readable summary notes and a self-contained HTML report (cards with profile photos) to the enriched observable. This data contains personal information and must only be used for lawful, authorised investigations (GDPR / legal basis / proper investigative framework).
short_description: Enrich an email, phone, username or wallet into its associated online accounts, profiles and breach exposures, linked back to the queried observable, with summary notes and an HTML card report.
